body.title: GitHub Action: tagged release → PyPI publish for TheIgors
body.result: Igor is not released standalone — ticket is moot. No action required.
body.description:
Add a GitHub Actions workflow to TheIgors repo that publishes to PyPI on every semver tag push (v*.*.*). Uses pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish. Requires PyPI API token in repo secrets.

**Affected files:** .github/workflows/publish.yml, pyproject.toml (verify metadata complete)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** publish workflow only; does not bump versions automatically
**Test plan:** push a test tag to a TestPyPI target first; verify install from TestPyPI
